notes: MegaBugs — mod tagging, quick-close button, and unread-dot fix. Every ticket can now be tagged with one or more Mega{x} mods from a preset picker in the detail view. Mod chips show on each list row; a new Mod dropdown in the filter bar lets you narrow to a single mod or Untagged. Owner-only quick-close (green tick) sits on every open ticket row so you don't have to open it to close it. Unread dot now clears when you read or close a ticket — closed tickets never show the dot at all, and any status change by the owner/collaborator marks their own view as read.
